subcodes.first_line: O beloved handmaiden of God! Think not that thou art forgotten. Thou art ever before Our sight, and thy labours and services are present [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز عزیز الهی گمان منما که فراموش شدی همیشه در نظری و زحمات و خدماتت پیش
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
